requirement_topic.en: EV Charging Connector / Plug Standard — Bharat AC-001 and DC-001 (AIS-138)
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车充电连接器/插头标准——Bharat AC-001与DC-001（AIS-138）
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車充電連接器/插頭標準——Bharat AC-001與DC-001（AIS-138）

summary.en: India's Ministry of Power and ARAI (Automotive Research Association of India) mandated the Bharat EV charging connector standards through AIS-138. AIS-138 Part 1 defines the Bharat AC-001 connector as a single-phase AC arrangement based on IEC 60309 / 16 A industrial socket hardware, not IEC 62196-2 Type 2. Bharat DC-001 is a low-voltage DC charging connector category for 72-200 V systems and is not CCS-2; the high-voltage CCS2 pathway is Bharat DC-002. The Ministry of Power's Guidelines for Installation and Operation of EV Charging Infrastructure 2024 (17 September 2024) mandate these connector types for public and semi-public charging stations in India. ARAI AIS-138 Part 2 covers communication protocols. Foreign chargers must physically comply with AIS-138 connector specifications to be deployable in India.
summary.zh: 印度电力部和汽车研究协会（ARAI）通过AIS-138强制要求使用Bharat电动汽车充电连接器标准。AIS-138第1部分定义的Bharat AC-001连接器为基于IEC 60309 / 16A工业插座硬件的单相交流方案，并非IEC 62196-2 Type 2。Bharat DC-001是适用于72-200V系统的低电压直流充电连接器类别，并非CCS-2；高电压CCS2路径对应Bharat DC-002。电力部《电动汽车充电基础设施安装与运营指南，2024》（2024年9月17日）要求印度公共及半公共充电站使用上述连接器类型。境外充电桩须在物理层面符合AIS-138连接器规范，方可在印度部署。
summary.zht: 印度電力部和汽車研究協會（ARAI）通過AIS-138強制要求使用Bharat電動汽車充電連接器標準。AIS-138第1部分定義的Bharat AC-001連接器為基於IEC 60309 / 16A工業插座硬件的單相交流方案，並非IEC 62196-2 Type 2。Bharat DC-001是適用於72-200V系統的低電壓直流充電連接器類別，並非CCS-2；高電壓CCS2路徑對應Bharat DC-002。電力部《電動汽車充電基礎設施安裝與運營指南，2024》（2024年9月17日）要求印度公共及半公共充電站使用上述連接器類型。境外充電樁須在物理層面符合AIS-138連接器規範，方可在印度部署。

standards_or_laws: AIS-138 Part 1 — Bharat EV charging connector (AC-001 and DC-001) specifications (ARAI)
AIS-138 Part 2 — Communication protocol for EV charging (ARAI)
Guidelines for Installation and Operation of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure 2024, Ministry of Power, 17 September 2024
IEC 60309 — Industrial plugs, socket-outlets and couplers (16 A industrial socket hardware reference for Bharat AC-001)
Bharat DC-001 — Low-voltage DC connector category for 72-200 V systems under AIS-138; not CCS-2 (high-voltage CCS2 is Bharat DC-002)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234 series connectors, which are distinct from both IEC 62196 and Bharat connector families. GB/T 20234.2-2015 defines the AC charging coupler (7-pin, 32 A, single-phase or three-phase) and GB/T 20234.3-2023 defines the DC charging coupler (9-pin, up to 1500 V / 800 A). These are physically and electrically incompatible with Bharat AC-001 and DC-001 connectors. A China-made EV charger fitted with standard GB/T connectors cannot be directly connected to Indian EVs designed for Bharat AC-001/DC-001 without hardware modification.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB/T 20234系列连接器，与IEC 62196和Bharat连接器族均不同。GB/T 20234.2-2015定义了交流充电接口（7针，32A，单相或三相），GB/T 20234.3-2023定义了直流充电接口（9针，最高1500V/800A）。上述接口与Bharat AC-001和DC-001连接器在物理及电气层面均不兼容。装配标准GB/T连接器的中国制造充电桩，未经硬件改造无法直接为设计使用Bharat AC-001/DC-001接口的印度电动汽车充电。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB/T 20234系列連接器，與IEC 62196和Bharat連接器族均不同。GB/T 20234.2-2015定義了交流充電接口（7針，32A，單相或三相），GB/T 20234.3-2023定義了直流充電接口（9針，最高1500V/800A）。上述接口與Bharat AC-001和DC-001連接器在物理及電氣層面均不相容。裝配標準GB/T連接器的中國製造充電樁，未經硬體改造無法直接為設計使用Bharat AC-001/DC-001接口的印度電動汽車充電。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: This is a fundamental hardware gap. Chinese EV chargers use GB/T 20234 connectors, which are physically incompatible with the Bharat AC-001 and DC-001 connectors mandated by AIS-138 and the Ministry of Power guidelines for India. Exported chargers must be redesigned or re-tooled to incorporate AIS-138-compliant connectors. A software/firmware update alone cannot resolve this gap. Additionally, the AIS-138 Part 2 communication protocol must be supported. Exporters should verify the current published revision of AIS-138 with ARAI, as the standard has been updated since its initial publication.
gap.zh: 这是一项根本性的硬件差距。中国电动汽车充电桩使用GB/T 20234连接器，与AIS-138及印度电力部指南要求的Bharat AC-001和DC-001连接器在物理层面不兼容。出口充电桩须重新设计或改模，以采用符合AIS-138的连接器。仅通过软件/固件升级无法解决此差距。此外，还须支持AIS-138第2部分通信协议。出口商应向ARAI核实AIS-138的现行发布版本，因该标准自首次发布以来已有更新。
gap.zht: 這是一項根本性的硬體差距。中國電動汽車充電樁使用GB/T 20234連接器，與AIS-138及印度電力部指南要求的Bharat AC-001和DC-001連接器在物理層面不相容。出口充電樁須重新設計或改模，以採用符合AIS-138的連接器。僅通過軟體/韌體升級無法解決此差距。此外，還須支援AIS-138第2部分通信協議。出口商應向ARAI核實AIS-138的現行發布版本，因該標準自首次發布以來已有更新。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AIS-138 Bharat connector types required for public/semi-public charging infrastructure under Ministry of Power guidelines; connector specifications enforced through BIS registration of charging equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 20234 series connectors required under SAMR/MIIT framework for EV chargers sold in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Power, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The connector hardware gap between Chinese GB/T 20234 and Indian Bharat AC-001/DC-001 (AIS-138) is a mandatory redesign requirement. Indian regulations mandate Bharat connector types for public charging infrastructure. Chinese GB/T connectors cannot substitute. Exporters must redesign the physical connector and verify AIS-138 Part 2 communication protocol compliance. This is among the highest-effort gaps for China-to-India EV charger export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 20234与印度Bharat AC-001/DC-001（AIS-138）之间的连接器硬件差距是一项强制性重新设计要求。印度法规强制要求公共充电基础设施使用Bharat连接器类型，中国GB/T连接器不可替代。出口商须重新设计物理连接器并验证AIS-138第2部分通信协议合规性。这是中国向印度出口充电桩中难度最高的差距之一。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 20234與印度Bharat AC-001/DC-001（AIS-138）之間的連接器硬體差距是一項強制性重新設計要求。印度法規強制要求公共充電基礎設施使用Bharat連接器類型，中國GB/T連接器不可替代。出口商須重新設計物理連接器並驗證AIS-138第2部分通信協議合規性。這是中國向印度出口充電樁中難度最高的差距之一。
